# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpcNetwork1
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    
- name: subnet1
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpcNetwork1.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.0.0/24   # Specify the CIDR range for your subnet, adjust as per requirements.
    
- name: subnet2
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpcNetwork1.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24   # Specify the CIDR range for your subnet, adjust as per requirements.
    
- name: subnet3
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    network: $(ref.vpcNetwork1.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24   # Specify the CIDR range for your subnet, adjust as per requirements.
